name: Fasting Glucose
description: Blood glucose measured after 8-12 hours of fasting. Primary indicator of glucose metabolism.

name: Fasting Insulin
description: Fasting insulin level indicating pancreatic beta-cell function and insulin sensitivity.
citations: Endocrine Society; Hyperinsulinemia as a marker of insulin resistance

name: Hemoglobin A1c
description: Three-month average blood glucose; gold standard for glucose control assessment.

name: Total Cholesterol
description: Sum of all cholesterol fractions in blood.
citations: American Heart Association; NCEP ATP III

name: LDL Cholesterol
description: Low-density lipoprotein; primary atherogenic lipid fraction.
citations: American Heart Association; NCEP ATP III

name: HDL Cholesterol
description: High-density lipoprotein; protective factor against atherosclerosis.
citations: American Heart Association; NCEP ATP III

name: Triglycerides
description: Primary circulating form of fat; marker of postprandial lipemia.

name: High-Sensitivity C-Reactive Protein
description: Marker of systemic inflammation; predictor of cardiovascular risk.

name: Interleukin-6
description: Pro-inflammatory cytokine associated with chronic disease.

name: Tumor Necrosis Factor-Alpha
description: Key pro-inflammatory cytokine; elevated in metabolic syndrome.

name: White Blood Cell Count
description: Total count of white blood cells; immune function indicator.
citations: Clinical Laboratory Standards Institute; CLSI standards

name: Red Blood Cell Count
description: Total erythrocyte count; oxygen-carrying capacity indicator.
citations: Clinical Laboratory Standards Institute; CLSI standards

name: Hemoglobin
description: Oxygen-carrying protein in red blood cells.
citations: Clinical Laboratory Standards Institute; CLSI standards

name: Hematocrit
description: Percentage of blood volume occupied by red blood cells.
citations: Clinical Laboratory Standards Institute; CLSI standards

name: Thyroid Stimulating Hormone
description: Pituitary hormone regulating thyroid function.

name: Free Triiodothyronine (T3)
description: Biologically active thyroid hormone form.

name: Free Thyroxine (T4)
description: Primary thyroid hormone driving metabolic rate.

name: Aspartate Aminotransferase
description: Liver enzyme indicating hepatic integrity.
citations: American Association for the Study of Liver Diseases

name: Alanine Aminotransferase
description: Liver-specific enzyme sensitive to hepatic injury.
citations: American Association for the Study of Liver Diseases

name: Gamma-Glutamyl Transferase
description: Enzyme marking bile flow and oxidative stress.
citations: American Association for the Study of Liver Diseases

name: Creatinine
description: Kidney function marker; byproduct of muscle metabolism.

name: Estimated Glomerular Filtration Rate
description: Estimated kidney filtration capacity.

name: Blood Urea Nitrogen
description: Nitrogen in urea; marker of protein metabolism and kidney function.

name: Total Testosterone
description: Primary male sex hormone; critical for muscle, bone, sexual function.

name: Free Testosterone
description: Biologically active testosterone unbound to proteins.

name: Estradiol
description: Primary circulating estrogen; critical for bone, cardiovascular, cognitive health.

name: Fasting Cortisol
description: Morning cortisol level; stress hormone and circadian rhythm marker.

name: 25-Hydroxyvitamin D
description: Primary circulating vitamin D form; bone, immune, and metabolic health.

name: Vitamin B12
description: Essential for neurological function, red blood cell formation, DNA synthesis.
citations: American Journal of Clinical Nutrition; https://doi.org/10.1093/ajcn/75.3.440

name: Serum Folate
description: One-carbon metabolism; critical for DNA synthesis and cell division.
citations: American Journal of Clinical Nutrition; https://doi.org/10.1093/ajcn/75.3.440

name: Serum Iron
description: Circulating iron; essential for oxygen transport and energy production.

name: Ferritin
description: Iron storage marker; also marker of systemic inflammation.

name: Serum Magnesium
description: Cofactor for 300+ enzymatic reactions; stress and energy metabolism.
citations: Journal of the American College of Nutrition; https://doi.org/10.1080/07315724.2009.10719780

name: Serum Zinc
description: Essential for immune function, wound healing, protein synthesis.
